title: Spanning Backup User Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for a Spanning Backup user object

fields.name: assigned
fields.description: Whether user has an active backup license

fields.name: backupStatus
fields.description: Backup status: ENABLED, DISABLED, or PENDING

fields.name: isAdmin
fields.description: Whether user is a SaaS admin

fields.name: isSuspended
fields.description: Whether user's SaaS account is suspended
